name: jira-execution-planner-frontend
description: Frontend build for Jira Execution Planner

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.watch: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const children = [['npm', ['run', 'watch:js']], ['npm', ['run', 'watch:css']]].map(([cmd, args]) => spawn(cmd, args, { stdio: 'inherit' })); const stop = () => children.forEach((child) => child.kill('SIGTERM')); process.on('SIGINT', () => { stop(); process.exit(130); }); process.on('SIGTERM', () => { stop(); process.exit(143); }); children.forEach((child) => child.on('exit', (code) => { if (code) { stop(); process.exit(code); } }));"
